title: Secure Protocols, State Machines, Replay, and Downgrade · Language Lens: Crypto Go Downgrade Negotiation
summary: A device pairing protocol encrypts messages but has no explicit roles, transcript, sequence numbers, version negotiation, terminal states, or duplicate policy. Predict the asset, adversary, security property, trust boundary, and falsifying evidence before opening the governing standard. Planned artifact: Add and verify the downgrade negotiation increment in authenticated protocol state machine. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and e…
objectives: Authenticate offered and selected versions, algorithms, parameters, and features and fail closed on unsupported or stripped choices.
Use nonces, counters, windows, durable identities, expiry, and idempotent effects according to channel and availability constraints.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Cryptography and Go Predict Crypto Go Downgrade Negotiation · Theory Crypto Go Downgrade Negotiation
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory cryptographic engineering team handles case 5106 during a replicated device restart. Build deterministic Go evidence to advance a role-bound protocol state with session identity, ordered replay defense, transcript binding, and downgrade rejection; keep browser execution deterministic and move production entropy, native timing, non-allowlisted crypto, network, HSM, and compliance claims to authorized transfer gates; then change one authenticated byte and prove clean rejection without partial effect. Browser code uses pure state models or the narrow side-effect-free crypto allowlist with fixed fixtures. Production entropy and keys, secret custody, native timing and side channels, networks, TLS, HSM/KMS, certificate systems, FIPS or compliance state, load, faults, restore, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Crypto Go Downgrade Negotiation contract for the supplied data.
